x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Deposit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where assets are placed into safe keeping for protection or custody.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Withdrawal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where assets are removed from safe keeping, either partially or fully.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Release Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where assets are released according to authorization rules, such as dual or owner approval.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Allocation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where assets are assigned or linked to specific agreements, obligations, or purposes while in safe keeping.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security Update Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies or modifies the protection level of assets, such as high-security custody or restricted access.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Safe Keeping Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies asset records, corrects errors, or updates allocations in the safe keeping system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Safe Keeping Transfer Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where assets are moved between safe keeping accounts or locations while maintaining security and custody integrity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correction Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses or corrects a previously recorded transaction related to assets in custody.
